title: Display lifecycle model refactor (load/unload/overlay/tab)
Phase 0: define canonical lifecycle model + invariants
notes: Completed: added memory-bank/DISPLAY_LIFECYCLE_MODEL.md as lifecycle contract.

title: Phase 1: introduce DisplayLifecycleOrchestrator and route load ingress
Phase 2: move async backend calls out of stores (store purity)
notes:
Next: move remaining async backend work out of stores (starting with surfaceStore load/register paths).
Completed: moved surface lifecycle backend async calls from surfaceStore to SurfaceLoadingService; surfaceStore now exposes pure state actions (setLoadingState/addSurface/setSurfaceGeometry).

title: Phase 3: remove StoreSyncService implicit cross-store sync
notes: Next focus: remove StoreSyncService implicit layer->viewState sync and write both stores directly from orchestrator/service layer.
close_reason: Phase complete: removed implicit StoreSyncService flow; lifecycle writes are explicit

title: Normalize layer event ownership after StoreSyncService removal
close_reason: Layer lifecycle sync now explicit in LayerApiImpl/LayerService; StoreSyncService removed

title: Phase 4: implement symmetric unload commands + UI unload paths
close_reason: Phase complete: symmetric unload commands and UI service paths implemented

title: Add backend unload commands (volume/surface/overlay)
close_reason: Added unload_surface/unload_surface_overlay/unload_volume backend commands + transport wiring

title: Validate unload and event model with targeted checks
close_reason: Validated with cargo check api-bridge and targeted LayerService tests; full UI tsc remains globally red pre-existing

title: Wire UI unload actions through services and tab cleanup
close_reason: UI unload flows now go through services with backend cleanup and tab close

title: Phase 5: unify surface overlay representation
Phase 6: replace timing heuristics with explicit readiness
Phase 7: align EventBus/contracts and remove drift
Phase 8: add lifecycle integration tests + runtime invariants
UI clarity + workflow modernization (sidebar, layers, actions)
acceptance_criteria:
- Delivers measurable readability and workflow improvements in Files and right sidebar without regressions in load/unload flows.
- Includes updated UI docs/screenshots for changed panels.
- All modified UI tests pass and no new accessibility violations are introduced for touched components.
notes: Follow-up for persistent right-shift: forced app-level horizontal overflow clamp (App container + html/body/#root overflow hidden) and status bar width/overflow constraints to prevent status-slot overflow from creating page-level horizontal scroll.

title: Design tokens foundation (colors, spacing, typography, borders)
description: Define canonical CSS/Tailwind tokens and replace hardcoded core panel primitives in ui2. Add token docs and migration checklist.
acceptance_criteria:
- Root tokens for color, spacing, type, radius, and focus are defined in a single source.
- At least core panel primitives (headers, controls, empty states) consume tokens instead of hardcoded values.
- Token naming and usage are documented for follow-on tasks.
close_reason: Design token foundation complete: audit, token mapping, and primitive/panel migrations are finished.

title: Token audit + component inventory
description: Inventory current hardcoded color/spacing/type values across high-traffic panels (Files, Volumes, Plots, headers) and map to proposed design tokens.
acceptance_criteria:
- Inventory identifies top repeated hardcoded color/spacing/type values in Files + right sidebar components.
- Inventory maps each discovered value to a proposed token name.
- Inventory is saved in project docs for implementation tracking.
notes: Implemented with ui2/src/docs/UI_TOKEN_AUDIT.md (value inventory + token mapping + migration checklist).

title: Define CSS variables + Tailwind token mapping
description: Add root token definitions and Tailwind theme aliases for background, text, border, accent, focus, spacing, and radius scales.
acceptance_criteria:
- New token set is defined in theme source and accessible in CSS/Tailwind utilities.
- No existing panel becomes visually broken after token introduction.
- Focus/accent/neutral token names are semantically clear.
notes:
Added semantic role/control/focus tokens to ui2/src/styles/theme.css and began consuming them in FileBrowserPanel styles.
Expanded token mapping in ui2/tailwind.config.js for typography roles, control sizing, spacing, and radius aliases; added reusable role/control utility classes in ui2/src/index.css; migrated additional production usage in VolumePanel and updated UI token audit doc.
close_reason: Token mapping complete across theme/Tailwind and consumed in production panel primitives with docs updated.

title: Migrate core panel primitives to tokens + docs
description: Replace hardcoded values in shared panel primitives and document token usage/migration checklist in ui2 docs.
acceptance_criteria:
- Shared panel primitives and Files panel use new tokens.
- Inline hardcoded style values are removed where token equivalents exist.
- A short migration checklist/doc is added or updated.
notes:
Started migration of core primitives: FileBrowser panel and VolumePanel now consume semantic token utilities; migration checklist kept current in ui2/src/docs/UI_TOKEN_AUDIT.md. Continuing remaining primitive cleanup.
Completed primitive migration in this slice: role/control utilities now applied in shared UI primitives (CollapsibleSection, PropertyRow/PropertyBox), plus Files/Volume panel token adoption and migration checklist updates.
close_reason: Core panel primitives and Files/Volume surfaces now consume semantic token utilities; docs/checklist updated.

title: Command palette (Cmd/Ctrl+K) for global app actions
description: Implement searchable command registry for panel toggles, file actions, layout switching, and load/unload commands.
acceptance_criteria:
- Cmd/Ctrl+K opens a searchable command palette.
- Core actions (panel toggle, layout switch, mount/load actions) are executable from palette.
- Palette supports keyboard navigation and enter-to-run.
notes: Started implementation. Building command palette UI and global command registry wired to keyboard shortcut Cmd/Ctrl+K.

title: Unified load/unload/overlay status queue in UI
description: Expose a single visual queue with operation state, progress, failure, retry/cancel for all display lifecycle operations.
acceptance_criteria:
- UI shows one lifecycle queue for load/unload/overlay operations with state and timestamps.
- Queue supports error visibility and retry/cancel affordances where possible.
- Queue state aligns with orchestrator events and does not duplicate stale entries.

title: Context-aware settings panels by selected layer type
description: Render settings modules by layer kind and state; hide irrelevant controls; keep advanced options behind progressive disclosure.
acceptance_criteria:
- Settings panel content depends on selected layer type and state.
- Irrelevant controls are hidden; advanced controls are progressively disclosed.
- Switching active layer updates settings context without stale UI artifacts.

title: Typography hierarchy overhaul for panel readability
description: Replace all-caps dense labels with clear text roles (title/section/label/body/value). Normalize tracking, line-height, and numeric-value rendering.
acceptance_criteria:
- Panel typography uses defined roles (title/section/label/body/value) with consistent case/tracking/line-height.
- Numeric/value fields are legible and visually distinct from labels.
- Updated components show improved readability in screenshots.
close_reason: Typography hierarchy overhaul completed across Files and key right-sidebar panels using role-based tokens/utilities.

title: Define typography role scale and utility classes
description: Define type roles (title/section/label/body/value) and utility class mapping for panel contexts.
acceptance_criteria:
- Typography role tokens/utilities are defined and reusable.
- Roles cover section title, field label, body, and value text.
- Utilities are adopted by at least one production panel.
notes: Added typography role scale aliases in tailwind theme and introduced reusable role utility classes (title/section/label/body/value/mono) in ui2/src/index.css. Adopted utilities in VolumePanel to validate production usage.
close_reason: Typography role utilities are defined and adopted in production panel components.

title: Apply typography roles to right-sidebar + Files panel
description: Migrate dense headings/labels in Volumes/Plots/Files panels to new typographic hierarchy.
acceptance_criteria:
- Files and right-sidebar sections use role-based typography.
- Excessive all-caps/tracking in data-heavy sections is reduced.
- Label/value readability improves without reducing information density.
notes: Applied role-based typography in right-sidebar panels and shared primitives: VolumePanel, PlotPanel header/empty state/actions, CollapsibleSection, and PropertyRow. Files panel tokenized headings/controls remain in place from earlier slice.
close_reason: Role-based typography applied to Files and right-sidebar surfaces, reducing dense all-caps/tracking in key data sections.

title: Accessibility pass: contrast, focus states, and hit targets
description: Raise contrast to WCAG AA for key controls/text, standardize focus-visible styles, and enforce minimum 32px interactive targets in dense panels.
acceptance_criteria:
- Touched controls/text meet WCAG AA contrast expectations.
- Keyboard focus is visible and consistent via focus-visible styles.
- Icon and dense controls meet minimum practical hit target size.
close_reason: Accessibility pass complete for touched Files/Volume/Plot surfaces: contrast, focus visibility, and dense hit-target improvements implemented.

title: Contrast and focus-visible audit + token corrections
description: Audit key UI surfaces for contrast/focus failures and patch tokens/styles to meet AA for primary text and controls.
acceptance_criteria:
- Contrast issues in touched surfaces are identified and fixed.
- Focus-visible rings are consistent across keyboard-focusable controls in touched components.
- Audit notes list resolved issues and any deferred edge cases.
notes:
Started targeted a11y pass on touched panels: harmonizing focus-visible rings and improving low-contrast text in Files/Volume/Plot components.
Resolved in touched surfaces: raised low-contrast muted text in Plot empty state and Files hint text; added consistent token-based focus-visible rings to Files action/search controls, CollapsibleSection toggles, Plot refresh button, and Volume interpolation/toggle controls. Deferred: broad app-wide contrast audit outside touched panels.
close_reason: Contrast/focus-visible corrections completed for touched Files/Volume/Plot components with deferred scope explicitly documented.

title: Enforce 32px target and icon-button interaction spec
description: Normalize hit targets and focus behavior in dense controls and icon buttons using shared primitives.
acceptance_criteria:
- Dense controls/buttons in touched panels meet target size standard.
- Hover/focus/disabled states are visually distinct.
- No layout breakage on narrow panel widths.
notes:
Starting hit-target normalization on dense controls in touched Files/Volume/Plot components, using tokenized minimum control sizes and preserving narrow-sidebar layout behavior.
Raised dense control targets in touched components to tokenized minima: Files action/sort controls now use control-md sizes, Plot refresh uses min-h-control-md, CollapsibleSection trigger uses control-md, and Volume interpolation/toggle controls increased to control-md with preserved hover/focus/disabled styling.
close_reason: Dense control hit targets and interaction states were normalized in touched Files/Volume/Plot surfaces without lint/test regressions.

title: Panel header simplification and action prioritization
description: Reduce header icon clutter; keep primary actions visible and move low-frequency actions to overflow menus with tooltips/labels.
acceptance_criteria:
- Panel headers expose only primary actions inline.
- Secondary actions are reachable through overflow with labels/tooltips.
- Header layout is consistent across at least Files and one right-panel surface.
close_reason: Panel header simplification delivered: taxonomy/spec completed and unified header action pattern implemented in Files and one right-sidebar panel.

title: Panel-header action taxonomy and overflow design
description: Classify panel-header actions by frequency/importance and define visible vs overflow behavior.
acceptance_criteria:
- Panel-header action list is categorized into primary vs overflow with rationale.
- Proposed header schema is documented and reviewable.
- Taxonomy covers Files and right-sidebar headers at minimum.
close_reason: Header action taxonomy and overflow schema documented for Files/right-sidebar headers, with baseline typed model for implementation.

title: Implement unified panel-header component pattern
description: Implement simplified header chrome with consistent icon affordances, tooltips, and overflow menu.
acceptance_criteria:
- New header pattern is implemented in Files panel and one additional panel.
- Overflow actions remain reachable with labels/tooltips.
- Existing functionality remains intact after migration.
notes: Implemented shared panel header pattern via ui2/src/components/ui/PanelHeader.tsx and applied it in FileBrowserPanel + SurfaceLayerPanel. Files now exposes Mount inline plus labeled overflow actions (Open File, Refresh Directory, Clear Search). Surfaces now exposes Load inline plus labeled overflow actions (Expand All, Collapse All, Clear Error).
close_reason: Unified panel-header action pattern is implemented in Files and Surfaces with labeled overflow menus and no regressions in targeted UI tests.

title: Right sidebar IA redesign with top-level tabs (Layers/Inspect/Mapping/Plots)
description: Restructure the right sidebar into task-focused tabs, persist active tab per workspace, and reduce vertical scrolling overload.
acceptance_criteria:
- Right sidebar renders top-level tabs: Layers, Inspect, Mapping, Plots.
- Active tab persists per workspace/session.
- Existing modules are relocated without breaking current interactions.
close_reason: Right sidebar IA now uses task tabs (Layers/Inspect/Mapping/Plots) with persisted state and validated behavior; child migration and QA tasks are complete.

title: Sidebar tab shell + persisted tab state
description: Add right-sidebar tab shell (Layers/Inspect/Mapping/Plots) and persist selected tab per workspace/profile.
acceptance_criteria:
- Sidebar tab shell exists and is keyboard navigable.
- Selected tab persists across reload/workspace switches.
- Default tab selection is deterministic.
notes:
Implementing non-breaking tab shell in right sidebar with persisted selection keyed by active workspace; existing panel behavior remains under default Layers tab.
Added a right-sidebar tab shell in VolumeLayerPanel with tabs: Layers, Inspect, Mapping, Plots. Implemented WAI-ARIA tab roles, arrow/home/end keyboard navigation, deterministic default (Layers), and per-workspace persisted selection via localStorage keyed by active workspace id.
close_reason: Sidebar tab shell with keyboard navigation and per-workspace persisted tab selection is now in place with deterministic default behavior.

title: Migrate sections into tabbed IA
description: Move existing right-sidebar modules into the new tab model and ensure consistent render behavior.
acceptance_criteria:
- Existing sidebar sections are assigned to new tabs and render correctly.
- Collapsible section behavior remains functional inside tabs.
- Scroll behavior is stable and does not trap focus.
notes:
Implementing section-scoped rendering so Inspect and Mapping tabs render distinct existing modules; wiring PlotPanel into Plots tab.
Completed module migration into tabbed IA in VolumeLayerPanel: Layers tab now hosts layer table/selection workflow; Inspect tab renders LayerPropertiesManager in inspect mode; Mapping tab renders LayerPropertiesManager in mapping mode; Plots tab renders PlotPanel inline. Added section-scoped rendering to LayerPropertiesManager/VolumePanel (sectionMode: all|inspect|mapping) so collapsible sections remain functional per tab without duplicated controls.
close_reason: Existing sidebar modules are now assigned to Layers/Inspect/Mapping/Plots tabs with functional collapsibles and stable scrolling behavior.

title: Sidebar tab QA: keyboard nav, scroll, and regressions
description: Validate tab navigation, panel-state persistence, and layout regressions across common workspace configurations.
acceptance_criteria:
- QA verifies keyboard tab nav, scroll behavior, and regression checklist pass.
- Known regressions are documented with follow-up tickets if unresolved.
- Screenshots are attached for before/after comparison.
notes: QA complete: tab keyboard navigation, per-workspace persistence, and module routing are covered by automated tests; manual regression checklist doc added at ui2/src/docs/SIDEBAR_TAB_QA.md.
close_reason: Sidebar tab QA acceptance met with automated coverage and documented regression checks.

title: Consolidate duplicate plot panels after tabbed sidebar rollout
description: Remove or merge the dedicated GoldenLayout PlotPanel now that Plots tab hosts plot controls in VolumeLayerPanel. Ensure a single canonical plot surface remains in the right sidebar IA.
acceptance_criteria: - Only one canonical plot controls surface remains in right sidebar workflows.\n- No regression in histogram interactions or panel layout stability.\n- GoldenLayout config and sidebar tab behavior remain consistent.
notes: Consolidation complete: removed dedicated PlotPanel from default GoldenLayout configs and ignored add-panel PlotPanel events so sidebar Plots tab is the canonical surface.
close_reason: Duplicate plot surfaces removed from right-sidebar workflows while preserving histogram interactions and layout stability.

title: Layer row redesign: clear active state, metadata, and quick actions
description: Redesign layer list rows to show type/name/status clearly with explicit active selection, visibility toggle, unload, and context menu.
acceptance_criteria:
- Layer rows show clear active state, name/type metadata, and visibility/unload actions.
- Row interactions are keyboard accessible.
- No regressions in layer selection/visibility behavior.
notes: Completed layer-row redesign in ui2/src/components/ui/LayerTable.tsx: stronger selected-state styling, inline type/source/status metadata, always-available visibility/remove actions, and overflow menu for secondary actions. Improved keyboard handling by moving ArrowUp/Down + Enter/Space behavior onto listbox key handling and keeping row actions tabbable. Added regression tests in ui2/src/components/ui/__tests__/LayerTable.test.tsx and kept sidebar tab tests green.
close_reason: Layer rows now have clear active state and metadata, keyboard-accessible quick actions (visibility/remove/menu), and regression tests verifying core interactions.

title: Files panel empty-state redesign with strong CTAs
description: Replace passive empty-state copy with actionable controls for Mount Directory/Open File and optional recent paths.
acceptance_criteria:
- Empty Files state presents clear actionable CTAs.
- Primary CTA allows users to start mounting/browsing immediately.
- Empty-state copy differentiates no-directory vs no-results states.

title: Files empty-state content and CTA spec
description: Define final empty-state structure, CTA labels, helper copy, and interaction states (idle, drag-over, mounted).
acceptance_criteria:
- Empty-state copy clearly communicates next action for both no-directory and no-results states.
- CTA labels are explicit and task-oriented.
- Copy/CTA spec is documented in issue notes or design notes.

title: Implement Files empty-state UI and wire actions
description: Implement redesigned empty-state component and wire Mount Directory/Open File actions and optional recent-path affordances.
acceptance_criteria:
- Empty-state layout includes primary and secondary action affordances.
- Primary action is wired to a working mount flow trigger.
- Component behaves correctly in no-directory and no-search-results scenarios.
notes: Added focused hook test coverage in ui2/src/hooks/__tests__/useMountListener.test.ts validating: mount-directory-event mounts directories, open-file-event triggers FileLoadingService.loadFile(path, 'file-dialog'), empty path no-op, and cleanup unlistens both handlers.

title: Workspace presets (Read/Explore/Analyze/Compare)
description: Add one-click layout presets tuned for common workflows using GoldenLayout config templates.
acceptance_criteria:
- At least four named workspace presets are available.
- Preset switching updates layout reliably without panel-loss regressions.
- Presets are discoverable from UI menus/commands.
notes: Implementing workspace presets (Read/Explore/Analyze/Compare) with discoverable UI entry point and stable GoldenLayout switching behavior.
close_reason: Acceptance met: four presets exposed, reliable preset switching via single apply path, discoverable UI + keyboard commands.

title: Save/restore named custom layouts
description: Persist user-defined layouts with schema versioning and recovery fallback for incompatible saved states.
acceptance_criteria:
- Users can save, rename, load, and delete named layouts.
- Layout persistence includes schema/version guard and fallback recovery.
- Corrupt/incompatible layout data does not crash UI.
notes: Implemented named layout persistence with schema version guard and corruption fallback via layoutLibraryStore. Added status-bar Layouts control to save/load/rename/delete named layouts. Added layoutService capture/apply/reset methods with workspace-tab rehydration to avoid panel-loss regressions during restore.

title: SSH Remote Folder Mounts (local-feel UX, secure creds, 2FA)
description: Context: Brainflow currently mounts local folders only, while users need to browse/load neuroimaging data from SSH hosts. The remotely crate now provides an interactive SSH contract (host-key challenge, keyboard-interactive auth), streamed downloads, and structured error categories. Brainflow must integrate this cleanly while preserving existing load/render flows and UI stability rules.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Users can mount an SSH-backed folder and browse it in Files with the same interaction model as local mounts.
2. UI displays remote origin only where needed (mounted root badge/tooltip) while child rows remain local-feel.
3. Host-key challenge and keyboard-interactive/2FA flows are fully supported in-app.
4. Optional credential caching stores secrets in OS keychain only; OTP/2FA responses are never persisted.
5. Remote file opens stage to local cache and load through existing load_file/render pipeline without regressions.
6. End-to-end tests and docs are updated; no regressions in existing local mount flows.

title: Integrate remotely contract via backend adapter boundary
description: Context: Keep protocol/runtime details in remotely, not spread across Brainflow command handlers. Add a thin adapter module in api_bridge that wraps connect_interactive/respond_host_key/respond_auth/download_to_path and normalizes error categories for app use.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. api_bridge compiles against current remotely APIs and exposes an internal adapter for connect/challenge/respond/download.
2. Adapter maps remotely ErrorCategory values into BridgeError variants used by frontend workflows.
3. Local mount behavior is unchanged.
4. cargo check -p api-bridge passes.

title: Add remote mount state model and shared bridge types
description: Context: Brainflow needs canonical types for mount origin and mount metadata, plus registry state for active remote mounts and cache mappings. This should be explicit and serializable for TS bindings.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. bridge_types includes mount-origin metadata types (local vs ssh) and remote endpoint display fields (user/host/port/root).
2. BridgeState includes a RemoteMountRegistry keyed by stable mount_id.
3. TS bindings are regenerated and consumed without type drift in packages/api.
4. Existing local tree payload contracts remain backward compatible or are migrated with explicit frontend updates.

title: Implement remote mount Tauri command surface
description: Context: Add explicit commands for connect/challenge-response/list/unmount and use them instead of overloading local mount commands.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Commands exist for remote connect, host-key response, auth response, list mounts, list remote directory, and unmount.
2. Connect returns challenge payloads (host-key/auth) or connected state with mount_id.
3. Command errors are structured for frontend decision logic (retry, prompt, deny, fatal).
4. Commands are registered in plugin permissions/capabilities and callable from transport layer.

title: Implement secure remote profile + credential storage policy
description: Context: Users want convenience (remember host/login/password) with safe storage. Non-secrets should live in app config; secrets in OS keychain; OTP responses must never persist.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Remote profiles persist non-secret metadata only (host/port/user/root/auth mode/remember flags).
2. Passwords/passphrases are stored/retrieved via OS keychain (keyring), never plain text in config/logs.
3. OTP/keyboard-interactive responses are kept in-memory only and are not persisted.
4. Clearing a profile removes corresponding keychain entries.

title: Add remote staging cache and load-through-local handoff
description: Context: Existing load_file expects local paths. Remote reads should stage files locally (atomic) and then reuse existing local loader/render path.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Opening a remote file downloads via remotely::download_to_path into a managed cache directory.
2. Cache entries track source endpoint/path and remote stat metadata for freshness checks.
3. Loader handoff uses existing load_file(local_cached_path) with no render path fork.
4. Failed/incomplete downloads never produce visible partial files due to atomic finalize behavior.

title: Add Files UI workflow for SSH mount, auth prompts, and origin badge
description: Context: UX target is local-feel browsing with explicit origin context only where needed. Add mount dialog + challenge modals + root-level origin indicator.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Files panel offers Mount Remote (SSH) with host/user/port/root/auth options.
2. Host-key and keyboard-interactive prompts are rendered as guided dialogs and support multi-step flows.
3. Mounted remote root row shows subtle origin indicator (for example SSH user@host tooltip with full ssh:// URI).
4. Child rows/files render and behave like local rows (same expansion, selection, drag, and load affordances).

title: Wire recovery, retries, and operation status for remote mount flows
description: Context: Network instability is expected. Surface retries/recovery clearly and avoid silent stalls. Integrate remotely recovery hooks and categorized errors into UI status/notifications.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Recovery events from remote fs/session are surfaced to UI status and telemetry.
2. Transient network failures trigger bounded retries and actionable status messages.
3. Fatal/auth/host-key failures produce explicit user actions (retry, re-auth, trust, cancel).
4. No infinite retry loops or duplicate queue entries in lifecycle/status UI.

title: Add end-to-end test matrix for local + remote mount parity
description: Context: Remote features must not regress local workflows. Add integration and UI tests focused on mount/auth/cache/list/load paths.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. Tests cover local mount baseline and remote mount flows (unknown host key, mismatch, 2FA challenge, auth denial).
2. Tests verify remote file open stages and loads successfully through existing pipeline.
3. UI tests verify origin indicator appears on mounted root and not on child rows.
4. CI and automation instructions document environment requirements for SSH auth-matrix tests.

title: Document architecture, runbook, and AGENTS updates for remote mounts
description: Context: Remote mount adds new security/runtime behavior that future agents and developers must understand quickly.
acceptance_criteria:
AC:
1. AGENTS.md and memory-bank architecture docs include remote mount data flow and ownership boundaries (remotely vs Brainflow).
2. Runbook documents credential storage policy, host-key trust behavior, and troubleshooting for common SSH failures.
3. Developer guide includes command/API inventory and test execution instructions for remote mount features.

title: Atlas system refactor: unified loader, data-driven catalog, decomposed frontend
description: Refactor the atlas/template/surface loading system to be modular, data-driven, and robust. Currently the system has redundant enums, 4 copy-paste load methods, hardcoded catalog, ghost menu entries, and an 807-line monolith listener.
close_reason: done

title: Remove 5 ghost atlas menu presets (hippocampus, CIT168, HCP thalamus, MDTB10, HCP hipp/amyg)
description: Delete get_hippocampus_presets, get_cit168_presets, get_hcp_thalamus_presets, get_mdtb10_presets, get_hcp_hippamyg_presets from menu_builder.rs and their menu construction in build_atlases_menu. These create user-visible menu items that always fail silently because no catalog entries or loaders exist. ~55 lines removed. File: src-tauri/src/menu_builder.rs lines 415-467, 555-588, 604-626.
close_reason: done

title: Delete redundant TemplateSpace/TemplateResolution enums, use neuroatlas Space/Resolution directly
description: Delete TemplateSpace and TemplateResolution enums from core/atlases/src/types.rs:116-191 (~75 lines). Replace AtlasConfig::parse_space() with neuroatlas Space::from_string(), rejecting Space::Custom. Replace parse_resolution() with direct Resolution enum matching. Remove the duplicated match blocks in service.rs load methods that re-parse already-parsed strings. Files: core/atlases/src/types.rs, core/atlases/src/service.rs.
close_reason: done

title: Collapse 4 duplicated load_*_atlas methods into single unified loader with dispatch
description: Replace load_schaefer_atlas, load_glasser_atlas, load_aseg_atlas, load_olsen_mtl_atlas (service.rs:598-1047, ~450 lines) with one load_atlas method + a create_atlas dispatch function. The only difference between the four is the constructor call; everything else (progress reporting, space/resolution parsing, spawn_blocking, error handling) is identical boilerplate. Target: ~80 lines. Depends on: enum cleanup (subtask 2). Files: core/atlases/src/service.rs.
close_reason: done

title: Replace hardcoded catalog with declarative ATLAS_REGISTRY constant
description: Replace populate_builtin_atlases() in catalog.rs:176-303 with a const ATLAS_REGISTRY array of AtlasRegistryEntry structs. Each entry declares: id, name, description, category, volume_spaces, surface_spaces, resolutions, network/parcel options, citation, download_size_mb. Both populate_builtin_atlases() and menu_builder.rs generate from this single source. Adding a new atlas = one registry entry + one arm in create_atlas(). Depends on: unified loader (subtask 3). Files: core/atlases/src/catalog.rs, src-tauri/src/menu_builder.rs.
close_reason: done

title: Decompose useAtlasMenuListener.ts (807 lines) into focused modules
description: Split the monolith into: (1) useAtlasMenuListener.ts (~60 lines) - thin event dispatcher, (2) atlas/handleVolumeAtlasAction.ts (~120 lines) - volume load + optional surface projection, (3) atlas/handleSurfaceAtlasAction.ts (~80 lines) - surface atlas preset orchestration, (4) atlas/fsaverageSurfaceManager.ts (~110 lines) - ensureFsaverageSurface logic, (5) atlas/applySurfaceAtlasOverlay.ts (~80 lines) - per-vertex label overlay. Also replace window.confirm() (line 627) with a proper React dialog. Independent of backend changes. Files: ui2/src/hooks/useAtlasMenuListener.ts.
close_reason: done
